title: SortItem — sort entry (shared type)
description: One sort criterion. Consumers: worksheet view multi-sort (`hap worksheet view update --view-json` moreSort attr) and workflow data-node sorts (`hap workflow node save-action / save-search / save-get-more --sorts`; workflow usage may add controlType). NOTE: chart sorts use a DIFFERENT keyed-object shape ([{"<controlId>": 1|2}]) — that one is documented with the chart module, do not use SortItem there.

controlId.description: Field (control) id to sort by. System fields work too (e.g. 'ctime' created-time, 'utime' updated-time).

controlType.description: The control's type integer. Optional; workflow node sorts usually carry it (e.g. 16 for a datetime field).
